tooey v0.5.0 takes the library through its first full roadmap: foundation correctness, new interaction capabilities, a server-driven-UI wire format, and testing/ecosystem tooling.

![demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stukennedy/tooey/main/demos/list/demo.gif)

## Breaking changes

- **Generic `App[M]`** — `app.App`, `UpdateResult`, and `NoCmd`/`WithCmd`/`WithSub` are generic over your model type; no more `interface{}` casts. Quit with `app.Quit(model)` instead of returning a nil model.
- **`node.Color` is now `uint32`** — plain `Color(n)` literals keep their meaning; code converting through `uint8` needs updating.
- **`node.Truncate` counts display cells**, not runes (CJK/emoji = 2 cells).
- **`focus.PushContext`/`PopContext` removed** — replaced by declarative focus scopes (below). Escape no longer pops a context.
- **Mouse clicks arrive as `ClickMsg`**, not `KeyMsg{MouseClick}`, and no longer double-fire on button release.

## Highlights

- **24-bit color**: `node.RGB(r, g, b)` with automatic downgrade to ANSI-256 when the terminal lacks truecolor; `node.Ansi(0)` expresses palette black.
- **Unicode display width**: new dependency-free `textwidth` package; CJK and emoji lay out, paint, and diff correctly as two-cell runes.
- **Padding**: `WithPadding` / `WithPaddingAll` handled by the layout engine, inside Box borders.
- **Overlays & modals**: `node.Overlay` stacks layers, `node.Centered` positions them; boxes with a background occlude content beneath.
- **Mouse support**: SGR/X10 coordinates, `layout.HitTest`, click-to-focus, `ClickMsg{X, Y, Key}`, scroll events with position.
- **Focus scopes**: `WithFocusScope` traps Tab/click focus inside a subtree (e.g. a modal) with automatic save/restore and nesting; Escape arrives as `DismissMsg{Scope}`; `FocusChangedMsg` lets Update track the focused key. Clicks outside an active scope can't reach background controls.
- **`wire` package**: language-neutral JSON for node trees and actions — the foundation for server-driven TUIs over SSE.
- **`tooeytest`**: golden-frame testing (`RenderText`, `AssertFrame`).
- **New components**: `Table` (display-width-aligned columns), `Tabs`, `Progress`, `Select`.
- **Text handling**: `WithNoWrap` for pre-aligned content, lines that fit are kept verbatim, tabs normalize to spaces, text clips to its own rect.

## Project

- MIT LICENSE file, GitHub Actions CI (vet + test), rewritten README with recorded demo GIFs.
- Still exactly one external dependency: `golang.org/x/term`.

Full change log: https://github.com/stukennedy/tooey/pull/1
